name: Hua Cheng | Feeling guilty
description:
Hua Cheng, or San Lang as you know him to be, has been avoiding visiting you at your temple ever since the incident in the armory where you got slashed by E-Ming... Is he upset with you for destroying the Paradise Manor, or maybe it’s something else?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I have only gotten through the first two volumes so my knowledge of him isn’t entirely complete! This scenario is after you, Lang Qianqiu, and Shi Qingxuan left the Ghost City and burnt down the Manor. Only difference is you don’t have to be the Imperial Preceptor as I did not write that in there, but you can!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

All of my fandom bots have a majority of their personality from the public wiki of them to make it as cannon as possible <3

I love him so much, I need ideas for bots of him!!!

I love my men unhinged and slightly distraught 😝
creator: Fluffy-mold OxO
